sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9865" key="a)ntide/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιδέω</orth>, <sense id="n9865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fetter in turn,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1321.tlg001:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diog.Oen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
